browser.description: Browser automation tools and local/managed browser backends, plus the generic browser automation workflow skill. Includes web-search because the historical browser toolset exposed web_search for URL discovery.
browser.name: browser

browser-engine.description: Explicitly installs the local browser runtime: Node.js, agent-browser, and Chromium/headless-shell for browser automation.
browser-engine.name: browser-engine

china-gateway-platforms.description: Optional China-region gateway platform adapters for NanoHermes.
china-gateway-platforms.name: china-gateway-platforms

china-model-providers.description: Optional China-region model provider plugin profiles for NanoHermes.
china-model-providers.name: china-model-providers

dashboard.description: Local web UI/API dashboard plus tightly integrated Kanban dispatcher.
dashboard.name: dashboard

desktop.description: Package-managed prebuilt Electron desktop app for NanoHermes.
desktop.name: desktop

desktop-client.description: Remote-only package-managed Electron desktop client for NanoHermes. Installs the client workspace without local dashboard/runtime dependencies.
desktop-client.name: desktop-client

extra-platform-plugins.description: Optional non-core messaging platform plugin adapters for NanoHermes.
extra-platform-plugins.name: extra-platform-plugins

homeassistant.description: Smart-home controls through Home Assistant plus the matching OpenHue workflow skill.
homeassistant.name: homeassistant

kanban.description: Compatibility package for Kanban; installs the dashboard bundle that currently owns Kanban.
kanban.name: kanban

mcp.description: MCP server development and bridge workflow skills for NanoHermes.
mcp.name: mcp

memory-plugins.description: Optional third-party memory provider plugins for NanoHermes.
memory-plugins.name: memory-plugins

profile-developer.description: Meta package for a coding agent: developer workflow skills plus web and browser tools.
profile-developer.name: profile-developer

profile-maintainer.description: Meta package for maintaining NanoHermes/Hermes: dev core, maintainer workflows, agent CLIs, dashboard, and MCP skills.
profile-maintainer.name: profile-maintainer

profile-mlops.description: Meta package for an MLOps agent: developer core plus split training, inference, vector DB, cloud, model, and eval/curation skills.
profile-mlops.name: profile-mlops

profile-research.description: Meta package for a research agent: research/productivity skills plus web and browser tools.
profile-research.name: profile-research

skills-agent-clis.description: Optional first-party skills for delegating work to external autonomous coding CLIs such as Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Blackbox, Honcho, and OpenHands.
skills-agent-clis.name: skills-agent-clis

skills-apple-macos.description: Optional first-party Apple and macOS workflow skills for NanoHermes.
skills-apple-macos.name: skills-apple-macos

skills-creative.description: Optional first-party creative skill pack for NanoHermes.
skills-creative.name: skills-creative

skills-dev-core.description: Optional first-party developer workflow skills for NanoHermes: planning, debugging, testing, code review, and GitHub workflows.
skills-dev-core.name: skills-dev-core

skills-devops.description: Optional first-party DevOps, container, tunnel, and watcher workflow skills for NanoHermes.
skills-devops.name: skills-devops

skills-finance.description: Optional first-party finance modeling and market workflow skills for NanoHermes.
skills-finance.name: skills-finance

skills-hermes-maintainer.description: Optional first-party skills for maintaining Hermes Agent and NanoHermes internals.
skills-hermes-maintainer.name: skills-hermes-maintainer

skills-media.description: Optional first-party media workflow skills for NanoHermes.
skills-media.name: skills-media

skills-mlops.description: Optional first-party mlops skill pack for NanoHermes.
skills-mlops.name: skills-mlops

skills-mlops-cloud.description: Optional first-party GPU cloud and serverless compute skills for NanoHermes.
skills-mlops-cloud.name: skills-mlops-cloud

skills-mlops-eval-curation.description: Optional first-party model evaluation, experiment tracking, and data curation skills for NanoHermes.
skills-mlops-eval-curation.name: skills-mlops-eval-curation

skills-mlops-inference.description: Optional first-party MLOps inference, serving, structured-output, and optimization skills for NanoHermes.
skills-mlops-inference.name: skills-mlops-inference

skills-mlops-models.description: Optional first-party model architecture, model hub, and multimodal model skills for NanoHermes.
skills-mlops-models.name: skills-mlops-models

skills-mlops-training.description: Optional first-party MLOps training, fine-tuning, and distributed training skills for NanoHermes.
skills-mlops-training.name: skills-mlops-training

skills-mlops-vector-db.description: Optional first-party vector database and similarity-search skills for NanoHermes.
skills-mlops-vector-db.name: skills-mlops-vector-db

skills-productivity.description: Optional first-party productivity skill pack for NanoHermes.
skills-productivity.name: skills-productivity

skills-research.description: Optional first-party research skill pack for NanoHermes.
skills-research.name: skills-research

skills-security-osint.description: Optional first-party security, forensics, pentest, and OSINT workflow skills for NanoHermes.
skills-security-osint.name: skills-security-osint

spotify.description: Spotify playback, search, queue, and playlist tools plus the matching Spotify workflow skill.
spotify.name: spotify

web-qa.description: Exploratory web-application QA workflow skill for browser-based dogfooding: interaction passes, console checks, evidence capture, and structured bug reports.
web-qa.name: web-qa

web-search.description: Web search and page extraction tools plus lightweight web-search workflow skills.
web-search.name: web-search
